case_title: SHANNON REDANZ VS. FUNG LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF CONTACTED THE SMALL CLAIMS SUPERVISOR ON FEBRUARY 3, 2022 TO INFORM THE COURT THAT DUE TO MEDICAL REASONS SHE IS UNABLE TO APPEAR FOR HER HEARING ON FEBRUARY 4, 2022 AND ASKS FOR A CONTINUANCE. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. ALL PARTIES ARE CONTACTED BY TELEPHONE BY THE CLERK AND NOTIFIED OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. (506/ WT) (SEE NOTES)
